mapper.select: SELECT provider_id, config_key, config_value, updated_at FROM provider_config ORDER BY provider_id ASC, config_key ASC
SELECT provider_id, config_key, config_value, updated_at FROM provider_config WHERE provider_id = #{providerId} ORDER BY config_key ASC
SELECT provider_id, config_key, config_value, updated_at FROM provider_config WHERE provider_id = #{providerId} AND config_key = #{configKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO provider_config ( provider_id, config_key, config_value, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{providerId}, #{configKey}, #{configValue}, #{updatedAt} ) ON CONFLICT(provider_id, config_key) DO UPDATE SET config_value = excluded.config_value, updated_at = excluded.updated_at
